question: Which group did I join first, 'Page Turners' or 'Marketing Professionals'?

retrieval_results.context:
User recently joined a book club group called "Page Turners" last week, where members discuss favorite novels and share recommendations, and is looking for suggestions for the club's next read.
User is actively seeking marketing resources on personal branding, having joined the 'Marketing Professionals' LinkedIn group yesterday to discuss industry trends and share resources, and is looking for recommended articles or online courses on personal branding.
User intends to share insights and discussions from the 'Marketing Professionals' LinkedIn group in their own posts, and wants guidance on how to do so without appearing promotional or spammy.
User is active on Facebook groups, inspired by discussions and connections, and intends to create a private Facebook group or community specifically for language learners and enthusiasts to connect, ask questions, and share resources.
User wants to host live events or webinars within the Facebook group, inviting language experts, native speakers, or other language learners to share experiences, with Q&A and discussion, to provide exclusive value and drive engagement.
User wants to suggest books on writing, publishing, or author platforms to a book club member who is publishing her debut novel.
User seeks advice on building an effective content calendar to organize LinkedIn posts and maintain consistency, and wants recommendations for tools or templates to facilitate this process.
User is interested in information about debut authors and the publishing process because a member of the book club, who is also an author, will be publishing her debut novel soon, and the user wants to learn more about the process.
User has participated in two book club discussions—one on "The Nightingale" and another on "The Hate U Give"—and wants tips on leading a book club discussion to facilitate more engaging conversation.
User intends to suggest "The Seven Husbands of Evelyn Hugo" as the next read for the book club, believing it is fun and engaging, and is seeking information about author Taylor Jenkins Reid.
